entry.title: Introducing Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber
entry.summary: Google introduces Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber to help defenders find, validate, and patch software vulnerabilities quickly and efficiently.

entry.title: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs approach to bioresilience
entry.summary: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs approach to bioresilience, using AI models to support prevention, detection and response.

entry.title: AI in Indian Education: Atal Innovation Mission and Google launch ATL Saathi
entry.summary: Atal Innovation Mission launches ATL Saathi, a Gemini powered AI assistant empowering India's educators to nurture the next generation of innovators.

entry.title: Securing internal systems against increasingly capable and imperfectly aligned AI
entry.summary: Discover our AI Control Roadmap: a defense-in-depth system to securely manage advanced, potentially misaligned AI agents.

entry.title: Unlocking UK house-building with AI-accelerated planning
entry.summary: Google DeepMind is working alongside the UK government to co-develop an AI-powered prototype to help cut application decision times by 50%.

entry.title: Google DeepMind and partners announce multi-agent safety research funding call.
entry.summary: Google DeepMind and partners are announcing a new technical research funding call of up to $10M for researchers worldwide to strengthen multi-agent safety.

entry.title: SIMA 2: A Gemini-Powered AI Agent for 3D Virtual Worlds
entry.summary: Introducing SIMA 2, the next milestone in our research creating general and helpful AI agents. By integrating the advanced capabilities of our Gemini models, SIMA is evolving from an instruction-follower into an interactive gaming companion.

entry.title: AlphaEarth Foundations helps map our planet in unprecedented detail
entry.summary: New AI model integrates petabytes of Earth observation data to generate a unified data representation that revolutionizes global mapping and monitoring

entry.title: AlphaEvolve: A Gemini-powered coding agent for designing advanced algorithms
entry.summary: New AI agent evolves algorithms for math and practical applications in computing by combining the creativity of large language models with automated evaluators

entry.title: News
entry.summary: Discover our latest AI breakthroughs, projects, and updates.
